title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SHERMAN COUNTY MEDICAL CLINIC HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary, patient-centered medical care for adults and children, as well as women's reproductive health, pregnancy testing, immunizations, sports participant physicals, and mental health and drug and alcohol assessment. 110 Main Street Moro, OR 97039 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Friday 8am-12:30pm Email (541) 565-3325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 565-3325 Billing/Administration (541) 565-0536 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Breast Examinations Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHERMAN COUNTY MEDICAL CLINIC
